data.title: Expedia Group expands B2B platform and launches GenAI tools
data.description: Central to the announcement is the rollout of a new set of APIs designed to give B2B partners more control over travel packaging and operations.

data.title: Temporary pause to tariffs on China 'a critical first step,' NRF says
data.description: The 90-day pause that the U.S. government announced on May 12 walks back increasing tariffs on products from China.

data.title: Coupa acquires Cirtuo to expand e-procurement and category management
data.description: Coupa’s acquisition of Cirtuo reflects an increasing demand in B2B procurement for systems that go beyond transactional processing.

data.title: 1-800-Flowers.com taps Home Depot veteran as new CEO
data.description: Adolfo Villagomez, who previously worked as The Home Depot's chief marketing officer, replaces 1-800-Flowers.com founder Jim McCann as its new CEO.

data.title: HealthWarehouse.com Q1 sales triple on strong B2B growth
data.description: Prescription sales reached $14.4 million, up 226% year over year. Most of that growth came from B2B partners.
